cmp: Debug with pudb and telnet client
desc: Debug with pudb and telnet client
body:
#telnet 127.0.0.1 6899
import subprocess
from pudb.remote import set_trace

r = subprocess.run(['tput', 'cols'], stdout=subprocess.PIPE)
cols = int(r.stdout.decode('utf-8'))

r = subprocess.run(['tput', 'lines'], stdout=subprocess.PIPE)
lines = int(r.stdout.decode('utf-8'))

set_trace(term_size=(cols, lines))

import argparse
parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
parser.add_argument('--experiment_name')
parser.add_argument('--hpo', default=False, action=argparse.BooleanOptionalAction)
args = parser.parse_args()

import logging
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
#logger.info, error, warning, debug

class TermColor:
	BLACK = '\033[30m'
	RED = '\033[31m'
	GREEN = '\033[32m'
	YELLOW = '\033[33m'  # orange on some systems
	BLUE = '\033[34m'
	MAGENTA = '\033[35m'
	CYAN = '\033[36m'
	LIGHT_GRAY = '\033[37m'
	DARK_GRAY = '\033[90m'
	BRIGHT_RED = '\033[91m'
	BRIGHT_GREEN = '\033[92m'
	BRIGHT_YELLOW = '\033[93m'
	BRIGHT_BLUE = '\033[94m'
	BRIGHT_MAGENTA = '\033[95m'
	BRIGHT_CYAN = '\033[96m'
	WHITE = '\033[97m'

	RESET = '\033[0m'
